productDisplayName: Nike Men's Kobe Epic White T-shirt
description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, with rib crew neck and graphic on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separately Do not use softeners Do not bleach Cool iron Tumble dry on low Do not iron on design Do not dry clean Get a piece of the legend in action with this Kobe Bryant Basketball tee from nike. This "Venomenon" inspired tee has a high-flying graphic that shows the legend in action. The tee made of Dri-Fit fabric to wick sweat away and keep you dry looks great on the basketball court or off it when teamed up with low hung jeans and nike shoes.
